guidance: The deliverable is a review of one paper; the sources are that paper's own extracted fulltext, figures, and tables. A claim is verified when the review accurately reflects what the paper says/shows. Flag: findings the paper does not actually make, overstated effect sizes, mis-described figures/tables, and any 'the paper proves X' where the paper only suggests X. This workflow operationalises that audit as a per-claim fan-out.
note: Run per paper folder. Resolve {folder} to the paper directory, then targets = its reviews/*.md and sources = its fulltext + figures + tables.
